data.title: Apple's Next Big Bet? Tim Cook-Led Company Is 'Exploring' Humanoid As Well As Non-Humanoid Robots For Smart Home Future, Says Top Analyst
data.description: Apple Inc. (NASDAQ: AAPL) is reportedly exploring the development of humanoid and non-humanoid robots for its future smart home ecosystem, according to a post by TF International Securities analyst Ming-Chi Kuo.

data.title: Spotify, Vertiv Holdings And More: CNBC's 'Final Trades'
data.description: Joseph M. Terranova picked Spotify Technology, which reported better-than-expected fiscal fourth-quarter 2024 financial sales.

data.title: Crocs Smashes Q4 Earnings Expectations Amid Accelerated China Growth; Stock Jumps
data.description: Crocs exceeds Q4 earnings expectations, driven by strong China growth, while HEYDUDE faces challenges, sending shares up.

data.title: Iron Mountain Q4 Earnings: Storage And Data Center Revenue Growth, Dividend Climbs 10%, Strong 2025 Outlook
data.description: Iron Mountain Inc (NYSE: IRM) reported Q4 financial results with increased earnings and revenues. The company also declared a 10% dividend increase.

data.title: Reagan's Sugar Quotas, Trump's Tariffs, And The Price Of Protectionism: Here's Why Coke And Pepsi In US Have High Fructose Corn Syrup Instead Of Sugar
data.description: As the tariff tensions waged by Donald Trump affect global policy, the former President Ronald Reagan used a similar trade barrier.
